Fields.Name: Local Light Distance Scale
Fields.Description: Local light calculation distance scale (0 does not calculate local light)

Fields.Name: Upscale Type
Fields.Description: Method type at the time of upscale

Fields.Name: Edge Correction Level
Fields.Description: Edge correction level performed only at bilateral (0- invalid, edge redraw permission at 1- 1 / 2x1 / 2 resolution, edge redraw permission with parameter reduction at 2- 1 / 2x1 / 2 + 1x1 resolution, 3 - 1 / 2x1 / 2 + 1x1 resolution edge redraw permission)

Fields.Name: Ray Sample Count Offset
Fields.Description: Offset of sampling number during ray marching

Fields.Name: Fog Volume Shadow Enabled
Fields.Description: Shadow permission (refers to shadow processing due to density changes in the area, where shadows are cast on the area)

Fields.Name: Fog Volume - Force Shadowing
Fields.Description: Forcibly casts a shadow on the area regardless of the setting when shadow is permitted (shadow processing is not affected)
